entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Chemical agents that inhibit or retard nitrification in soil or microbial culture by affecting nitrifying bacteria

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of oxidizing ammonium to nitrite and then to nitrate

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium in which nitrification occurs and can be inhibited

entities.name: MICROBIAL CULTURE
entities.description: The medium in which nitrification occurs and can be inhibited

entities.name: NITRIFYING BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria responsible for the nitrification process

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: The chemical substance that is oxidized to nitrite during the first stage of nitrification

entities.name: NITRITE
entities.description: The chemical substance produced from ammonium and further oxidized to nitrate

entities.name: NITRATE
entities.description: The final chemical product of the nitrification process

entities.name: OXIDATION OF AMMONIUM TO NITRITE
entities.description: The specific step in nitrification where ammonium is converted to nitrite, which is retarded by specific nitrification inhibitors

entities.name: OXIDATION OF NITRITE TO NITRATE
entities.description: The specific step in nitrification where nitrite is converted to nitrate, which is not affected by specific nitrification inhibitors
